question: What's included in the pricing plans?
answer: Starter ($29/mo) includes 2 seats, appointments, POS, basic marketing. Growth ($59/mo) includes 5 seats plus advanced analytics, automation, and priority support. All plans include SMS, website, cart, and QuickBooks integration at no extra cost.

question: How many team members can use NeonO?
answer: Starter includes 2 seats, Growth includes 5 seats. Additional seats are $9.99/month each. Each seat gets full calendar access, POS permissions, and client management tools.

question: Do you charge commission on tips?
answer: No! Unlike many competitors, NeonO never takes commission on tips. Your staff keeps 100% of their tips while you pay transparent processing fees: 2.6% + 10¢ or 2.5% + 20¢ per transaction.

question: Is SMS marketing included?
answer: Yes! All plans include SMS campaigns, appointment reminders, and automated follow-ups. No per-message fees or monthly SMS add-ons like competitors charge.

question: Can I use my own website?
answer: Yes! NeonO includes a free website builder, but you can also embed our booking widget on your existing site. Online booking, payments, and client management work seamlessly either way.

question: What types of businesses use NeonO?
answer: Hair salons, barbershops, spas, nail salons, aesthetics clinics, massage therapy, and other appointment-based beauty and wellness businesses. Our features adapt to your specific industry needs.

question: How does QuickBooks integration work?
answer: NeonO syncs daily sales, tax data, and expense categories directly to QuickBooks Online. No manual data entry or separate accounting add-on fees required.

question: Can I try before I buy?
answer: Yes! Start with our free trial - no credit card required. Import your existing client data and test all features with real appointments before deciding on a plan.
